text: A district judge sanctioned plaintiff’s counsel Gavril T. Gabriel for citing a fabricated case ("In re Shubert, 799 F.3d 1124") three times across summary-judgment oppositions. Gabriel admitted using LexisNexis+ and its drafting feature Protégé. The court found bad faith, compounded by attempts to bury and minimize the misconduct.
mitigation_gap: No verification of AI-generated citations; concealment of AI use until ordered to disclose.
reliance_or_harm: Fabricated authority cited three times; bad-faith conduct found.
